rules.rule: Errors must be wrapped with fmt.Errorf and %w, never silently discarded
Do not compare errors with == unless using sentinel errors; use errors.Is or errors.As
Goroutines must have a clear termination path; flag unbounded goroutines
This is a Bubble Tea TUI app. All state mutations happen in Update(). View() must be pure. Commands return tea.Cmd, never block.
Shell commands executed via sh -c must use the {{sh .Field}} template function for escaping user-controlled values
GitLab API calls must handle pagination. Hardcoded PerPage limits should be documented if they truncate results.

files.description: Project architecture, key patterns, and build commands

other.content: This is a terminal CLI tool, not a web service. Network latency and HTTP endpoint security concerns do not apply. Focus on correctness, error handling, and shell injection risks.
